name: EffectGroup_cleanup

source: Code analysis: checks global ptr != null, calls two sub-functions then vtable 0x18 method on result, sets global flag to 1

source: Code analysis: stores r3 into global at 0x28, bounds-checks offset 0x68, inserts into array via vtable 0x18, sets bit 1 at offset 0x40 on success

source: Code analysis: iterates calling sub_0x0005646c (third variant of search function), searches global list

name: PlayerSub10::updateAutoDriftAngle

name: PlayerSub10::initDriftAuto
source: Code analysis: checks vtable bit 24 (0x01000000) and bit 13 (0x00002000) to set drift direction at 0xcc to -1 or 1. Clears flag, sets drift bit 8, stores to driftState 0xfc and mtBoost 0x104. Determines drift direction from player state.

name: PlayerSub10::initDriftForced
source: Code analysis: always sets drift direction to 1 (right), clears flags, sets drift bit 8, stores to 0xfc and 0x104. Identical to initDriftAuto but unconditionally sets direction=1. Used for forced drift start.

name: PlayerSub10::endDrift
source: Code analysis: calls releaseMt(0, 0) at 0x80582f9c, clears 0xcc (driftDir), 0xd0, 0xfc (driftState), 0x100, 0xfe. Sets bit 2 at 0x254 (specialFloor). Full drift state reset.

name: PlayerSub10::vec3CrossMagnitude
source: Code analysis: pure math helper taking two Vec3 (r4, r5), computes cross product, then sqrt of dot(cross, cross). Returns float magnitude of cross product. No player-specific access.

name: PlayerSub10::updateDriftAngle
source: Code analysis: called by updateManualDrift (0x8057dc44). Checks global frame counter at 0x78, reads drift direction from 0xcc (-1 or 1), adjusts outsideDriftAngle at 0x9c by fixed increment per frame. Clamps to max. Calls vtable method at end.

name: PlayerSub10::initDriftAngle
source: Code analysis: clears all drift state (0xcc, 0xd0, 0xfc, 0x100, 0xfe), calls getSpeed (0x80590d60), gets speed at 0x68, clamps outsideDriftAngle at 0x9c by adding/subtracting speed. Initializes drift angle from current speed.

name: PlayerSub10::activateBoostSlot
source: Code analysis: generic boost activation. Takes slot index (r4) and duration (r5). Guard checks on vtable/state flags. Table lookup via getPlayerIdx, rumble (0x806a5d24), sound (0x80708a6c), stores duration at 0x10c+slot*2, sets bit in 0x118, stores float at 0x124, plays sound (0x807cbb5c), calls 0x80591084(4,0,1).

name: PlayerSub10::activateBoostMushroomClean
source: Code analysis: boost activation for mushroom (slot 1, bit 2 at 0x118, stores at 0x110). Extra: clears 0x18e (ink timer) if flag 0x10000000 set, stores 0 to 0x148. Sets bit 0x80 in state. Same guard/rumble/sound pattern as activateBoostSlot.

name: PlayerSub10::updateStar
source: Code analysis: checks bit 0x80 at state 0xc (star active), decrements 0x18c (starTimer). On expire: clears flag, plays sound 0x116 via vtable 0xe0, resets 0x18c, calls 0x805b4f48(0). Updates scale at 0x178 by decrementing by 0x44(float) each frame, clamped to 0.

name: PlayerSub10::deactivateStar
source: Code analysis: clears flag at 0xc (star/mega active), plays sound 0x116 via vtable 0xe0, resets 0x18c (starTimer) to 0, calls 0x805b4f48(0). If r4(param) != 0: resets scale at 0x178 to 1.0. Immediate star deactivation.

name: PlayerSub10::activateMega

name: PlayerSub10::startMega
source: Code analysis: clears flag at 0xc, looks up player params via getPlayerIdx*0x248, calls 0x80795f64 (mega activation sound), plays sound 0x113 via vtable 0xe0, sets 0x194 (MegaTimer), calls 0x80598378 with 1.0, sets 0x196 flag, calls 0x805b4f48(1). If r4==0: resets 0x17c (megaScale) to 1.0.

name: PlayerSub10::updateMega
source: Code analysis: checks bit 0x8000 at 0xc (mega active), decrements 0x194 (MegaTimer). On expire: clears flag, plays sound 0x113, resets 0x194, calls 0x80598378, sets 0x196, calls 0x805b4f48(1). Updates 0x17c (megaScale) by adding 0x3c(float) each frame, clamped by getBspWheel(0x184).

name: PlayerSub10::startCrush
source: Code analysis: sets bit 1 at 0xc (crush flag), plays sound 0x1a4 via vtable 0xe0, stores r4 (duration) at 0x192 (crushTimer), calls 0x805b4e40. Starts crush effect with given duration.

name: PlayerSub10::updateCrush
source: Code analysis: checks bit 0x10000 at 0xc (crush active), decrements 0x192 (crushTimer). On expire: clears both crush flags (0x10000), plays sound 0x1a5 via vtable 0xe0, calls 0x805b4e74. Crush timer countdown.

name: PlayerSub10::endCrush
source: Code analysis: checks bit 0x10000 at 0xc (crush active), immediately clears crush flag, plays sound 0x1a5 via vtable 0xe0, calls 0x805b4e74. Immediate crush cancellation without timer check.

name: PlayerSub10::updateBullet
source: Code analysis: decrements 0x152 (bullet timer), checks player type flag (0x3a==1), gets state via 0x90de4, checks if 0xb (stunned state). If speed < threshold: calls vtable respawn. Checks 0x40000 flag (bullet), sets state 0xb via 0x90d9c. Handles rumble patterns for character types (global 0xb70), calls 0x806ac8a8 or 0x806acd64. Sets 0x154 (bullet active byte).

name: PlayerSub10::updateInvincibility
source: Code analysis: checks 0x40000 flag (star invincibility), decrements 0x160 (invinc timer). On expire: plays sound 0x1aa, clears flag, calls 0x807960a0. Second block: checks 0x20000 flag, increments 0x21c frame counter. At threshold 0x5a: calls 0x805917c4. At final threshold: clears 0x20000, plays sound 0x1a/0x1b, calls computeStartBoost (0x80595cf4). Star invincibility + post-star start boost sequence.

name: PlayerSub10::updatePlayerScale
source: Code analysis: gets PlayerPhysics at 0x260, calls 0x805b4ff8 (physics accessor), does 3x3 matrix multiply with speed data (0x160, 0x178, 0x17c, 0x180). Stores results at 0x170, 0x174, 0x184 (scale factors). Calls 0x805916a4 if denominator nonzero. Computes display scale from speed/physics matrices.

name: PlayerSub10::startSquish
source: Code analysis: sets bit 0x100 at state offset 8, stores r4 (duration) at 0x1a8 (squish timer), calls 0x805910cc + 0x8056c7d4 (external effect start). Small function (60 bytes), direct timer set with effect activation.

name: PlayerSub10::tryStartSquish
source: Code analysis: checks state 0x14 for bit 3 (0x08), if not set: sets bits 1 and 7 at 0x14, resets 0x1ac to 0. Then checks character body type from global 0xb70. If valid: sets bit 0x100 at offset 8, stores duration at 0x1a8, calls 0x805910cc + 0x8056c7d4. Guard-protected squish start.

name: PlayerSub10::updateSquish
source: Code analysis: checks bit 0x100 at offset 8 (squish active), decrements 0x1a8 (squish timer). On expire: clears bit 0x100, calls 0x805910cc + 0x8056c7e4 (effect end). Then: checks global 0xb78, state flags (0x10000, 0x08, 0x10, 0x6000), increments 0x1ac (grow-back timer). At threshold: calls 0x80591834(6), resets 0x1ac, clears/set bits at 0x14. Squish timer + grow-back animation.

name: PlayerSub10::cancelSquish
source: Code analysis: immediately clears bit 0x100 at offset 8, calls 0x805910cc + 0x8056c7e4 with r4=1 (immediate end). Minimal function (60 bytes), force-cancels squish without timer check.

name: PlayerSub10::applySquish
source: Code analysis: checks character body type from global 0xb70. If valid: sets bit 0x100 at offset 8, stores global frame as duration at 0x1a8, calls 0x805910cc + 0x8056c7d4. External squish trigger (from Thwomp/Mega hitting player).

source: Code analysis: 1496B, 35 calls. Massive function calling physics subsystems (0x80589fa4=init, 0x8058be60=wheelInit, 0x8058b1d8=collision, 0x8058d5b0=suspension, 0x8058b4d4=stabilize, 0x80520c4c/0x80520d50/0x80520e50=external physics). Matches player.h update(float, float, bool) pattern. This IS the main PlayerPhysics::update.
